character.name: A pattern-wraith, a dungeon creature made of mineral body and fungal nerve, the residue of repeated high-stakes simulations given physical form, it looks like an argument made flesh, its body is crystallized root-stone fragments held together by dark mycelial threads, amber-red light pulsing in its core, its shape suggests a corrupted construct whose purpose loop collapsed into predation, not a monster but a failure of purpose given teeth, expressive face, readable silhouette, gentle stylization, painterly shading, tactile brushwork, hand-painted solarpunk fantasy, storybook warmth, dramatic lighting, deep amber-red internal glow against dark chamber background, no neon, no chrome, no cyberpunk
